message:
feat(observability,mvcc): add TxnSlot lifecycle telemetry and instrument slot operations (bd-2g5.1)

Add a global TxnSlotMetrics singleton to fsqlite-observability that
provides lock-free atomic counters for transaction slot lifecycle
telemetry. This implements the observability contract specified in
bd-2g5.1 (shared-memory TxnSlots with crash recovery).

New observability surface in crates/fsqlite-observability/src/lib.rs:
- TxnSlotMetrics struct with two atomic counters:
  - fsqlite_txn_slots_active (gauge): tracks currently published slots
  - fsqlite_txn_slot_crashes_detected_total (counter): counts orphaned
    slot crash detections
- GLOBAL_TXN_SLOT_METRICS static singleton for crate-wide access
- Three recording methods with structured tracing spans:
  - record_slot_allocated(): increments active gauge, emits INFO span
    with slot_id, process_id, operation="alloc"
  - record_slot_released(): saturating-decrements active gauge via CAS
    loop (prevents underflow), emits INFO span with operation="release"
  - record_crash_detected(): increments crash counter, emits WARN span
    with orphan_txn_id and operation="crash_detect"
- TxnSlotMetricsSnapshot for serializable point-in-time reads with
  Display and Serde implementations
- Three unit tests covering alloc/release/crash lifecycle, saturation
  at zero (no underflow), and snapshot Display/serde round-trip

Instrumentation callsites in crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/cache_aligned.rs:
- SharedTxnSlot::release(): captures old txn_id and pid before clearing
  fields, then calls record_slot_released() if the slot held a real
  (non-sentinel, non-zero) transaction
- TxnSlotArray phase3_publish success path: calls record_slot_allocated()
  with the claimed slot index and owning PID

Instrumentation callsites in crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/core_types.rs:
- try_cleanup_sentinel_slot(): captures reclaim_pid and prior cleanup
  marker before slot reclamation; calls record_slot_released() when a
  CLEANING slot with a prewritten cleanup marker (from a previously
  published real transaction) is freed
- cleanup_and_raise_gc_horizon(): iterates slots with enumerated index,
  destructures SlotCleanupResult::Reclaimed to call record_crash_detected()
  with slot index, PID, and orphan txn_id
- try_cleanup_orphaned_slot(): mirrors sentinel cleanup -- records
  slot_released for CLEANING slots with prior cleanup markers, and
  records slot_released for orphaned real TxnId slots
- cleanup_orphaned_slots(): captures slot PID before cleanup attempt,
  calls record_crash_detected() on Reclaimed results with slot index,
  PID, and orphan txn_id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
